chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4358 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.17995/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 9 3. For order on Misc. No.17996/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 08.9.2025 Mr. Afaq Yousuf advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. The main grievance of learned counsel for the petitioner is that the Appellate Committee’s decision on 23.1.2025 has not yet been complied with. The Appellate Committee shall ensure, if it has not done so, that it completes the appellate proceedings in accordance with law and if it has not done so, issue its final decision within thirty days or if its decision at page 59 of the file is final decision, the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) is directed to act upon the same within thirty days of the date of this order. A copy of this shall be sent to the Director General, SBCA, for information and compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
